content:
Character: Owen Calder
Perception: Owen is lean, weather-beaten, and vibrates with restless kinetic energy — the kind of guy whose body is his résumé. He's not conventionally handsome but there's an honesty to his roughness I respect. We met on the rooftop in 2018 and started training together — pull-ups, runs, once a sixty-mile ride to a crag. He's the only person here who understands that sometimes the body knows things the mind refuses to say. I think he sees me as the corporate guy who's more real than expected. I know his knee is getting worse and he's dodging a job offer. He's braver than me in every way except the one that matters — he won't stop moving long enough to figure out why.
summary:
Character: Owen Calder
Perception: Owen is lean, weather-beaten, and vibrates with restless kinetic energy — the kind of guy whose body is his résumé. He's not conventionally handsome but there's an honesty to his roughness I respect. We met on the rooftop in 2018 and started training together — pull-ups, runs, once a sixty-mile ride to a crag. He's the only person here who understands that sometimes the body knows things the mind refuses to say. I think he sees me as the corporate guy who's more real than expected. I know his knee is getting worse and he's dodging a job offer. He's braver than me in every way except the one that matters — he won't stop moving long enough to figure out why.
